method_zone: All Wrath of the Lich King Dungeons
experience_descriptions.method_description: Run through any classic or burning crusade era with the appropriate tabard, every kill gives reputation torwards the faction
Do quests in these zones to get reputation for your factions
Run through daily quests in the Argent Tournament to represent your faction
While doing daily quests in the Molten Front, you acquire marks you can use to trade for Orgrimmar Writs of Commendation

method_zone: All Wrath of the Lich King Dungeons
experience_descriptions.method_description: Run through any classic or burning crusade era with the appropriate tabard, every kill gives reputation torwards the faction
Do any of the available quests in the forbidden reach
Kill any of the daily rares available for a reputation boost
While farming rares, they have a chance to drop an 'interesting item' to turn into as a quest
Do any of the available quests in the forbidden reach
Kill any of the daily rares available for a reputation boost
While farming rares, they have a chance to drop an 'interesting item' to turn into as a quest
While in a pvp game, every capture earns 35 reputation on normal days
While in a pvp game, every capture of the enemy flag earns reputation
While in a pvp game, every set amount of resources earns reputations
While in a pvp game, every set amount of resources earns reputations
While in a pvp game, every kill earns you reputation
You may get repeatable quests in the faction hub to go into pvp games and turn in for varying amounts of reputation
While in a pvp game, every kill earns you reputation
You may get repeatable quests in the faction hub to go into pvp games and turn in for varying amounts of reputation
You may queue for a 1v(whatever) fight in the arena, only one person may fight at a time and the rest form a line. 28 fights are needed in total before maxing out this reputation
You may queue for a 1v(whatever) fight in the arena, only one person may fight at a time and the rest form a line. 28 fights are needed in total before maxing out this reputation

rewards.reward_name: Pattern: Golden Mantle of the Dawn

experience_descriptions.method_description: Follow the quest chain in the Eastern Plaguelands, starting at Fiona's caravan, all the way until you complete the quest 'Argent Call: The Trial if the Crypt', this quests will get you to revered

Once Revered, you may take repeatable quests to get the remainder of the reputation. 'Annals of the Silver Hand' and 'Aberrarions of Bone' has you go into raid/dungeon instances and complete objectives, these can be completed 5 times every hour
You may kill Twilight Cultists in the area in order to gain reputation
You may run specific quests in these zones to get reputation, for the specific quests, look on wowhead
Run through the raids weekly, the bosses will give reputations
You may acquire 'Encrypted Twilight Text' from either killing Twilight Cultist or buying them from the Auction House
If you manage to get an unfriendly rank or worse, you may complete a repeatable quest indeffinately until you are neutral

Killing specified enemies in these zones will award reputation for one specific reputation, and awards 'overflow' reputation to the other 3 factions at a reduced amount. (Note: Reputation rates are reduced after hitting revered)

Doing quests in these zone awards reputation for the factions, the main factions zone gets full points and the rest get reduced amount. (Note: Its recommended to do the quests after getting revered, else it becomes harder)
If you manage to get an unfriendly rank or worse, you may complete a repeatable quest indeffinately until you are neutral

On the first sunday of the month, the Darkmoon Faire opens for a week. In this week you may do dailies that are no more than mini games, doing all dailies will reward 14k rep for this faction.
Find/Buy 20-22 Fiery Core/Lava Core and turn them into Lokhtos Darkbargainer for a boost to exalted.
Kill any enemies inside the Temple of Ahn'Qiraj, any basic enemy or boss will reward reputation up to a point until your Honored.

Inside the Temple of Ahn'Qiraj, 3 dragons sit near the entrance after the first boss, each gives quests that, once completed, will reward reputation. It is recommended to save insignias for some of these quests until you get to Honored, when trash stops giving reputation.
Every boss you kill rewards a small/medium amount of reputation for this faction.
Kill any enemies inside the Temple of Ahn'Qiraj, any basic enemy or boss will reward reputation up to a point until your Honored.
Every boss you kill rewards a small/medium amount of reputation for this faction.
Kill any enemies affiliated with the sydnicate, any basic enemy will reward reputation up to a point until your Friendly.
If you have any intention to increase this reputation past friendly, you need to level a rogue and pickpocket enemies to get Heavy Junkboxes, which you then turn in for reputation
Kill any enemies affiliated with Ravenholdt, any basic enemy will reward reputation up to a point until your Neutral.
Killing specified enemies in these zones will award reputation for this faction.
Do specific quests in these zones to get reputation for your factions
Doing turn in quests for this faction gives a large chunk of reputation. There are 4 different quests, 2 in each zone that rewards 2k reputation each
Doing repeatable quests for this faction gives a chunk of reputation each, complete for 20 days and youll have exalted, the toy, and the mount.
